toolPurpose: List files and folders in a specified Dropbox path with cursor-based pagination support for large directories.

path.description: Dropbox path to list (use '' for root, or '/folder/subfolder' format). Must start with '' or '/'

recursive.description: If true, recursively list all contents including subfolders

include_deleted.description: If true, include deleted files in listings (for trash/recovery)

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return per request (1-2000, default 500)

cursor.description: Cursor for pagination to retrieve next batch of results

toolPurpose: Search for files in Dropbox by name, content, or file properties with advanced filtering options.

query.description: Search query string (e.g., 'budget.xlsx', 'presentation', '.pdf' for file extension)

path.description: Limit search to a specific folder path (optional)

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-1000, default 100)

file_status.description: Filter by file status (active, deleted, or all)

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed metadata for a specific file or folder including size, modification time, sharing status, and content hash.

path.description: Full path to the file or folder (use '' for root)

include_media_info.description: Include media properties like image dimensions and video duration

include_has_explicit_shared_members.description: Include information about explicit shared members

toolPurpose: Create a new folder in Dropbox at the specified path. Requires Steward confirmation due to persistent storage impact.

path.description: Full path for the new folder (e.g., '/Documents/Projects/NewProject')

autorename.description: If true, automatically rename if a folder with same name exists (e.g., 'NewProject (1)')

toolPurpose: List all shared links created for a specific file or folder, including expiration and access levels.

path.description: Full path to the file or folder to retrieve shared links for

toolPurpose: Retrieve account storage usage information including allocated quota, used space, and remaining capacity.
